name: Deterministic Repository Indexing
objective: Produce byte-stable repository, file, symbol, and relation evidence from exact committed Git objects through pinned Go, TypeScript, and Python adapters, then publish canonical identity, provenance, lifecycle, deltas, and invalidations through PostgreSQL and governed artifacts.
scope: strict repository snapshot, file card, symbol card, and relation evidence contracts
bounded committed-Git ingestion with deterministic path, blob, rename, and change-set semantics
source-pinned Go, TypeScript and JavaScript, and Python extraction adapters
canonical byte-stable bundles, identities, diagnostics, and evidence closure
Migration 008 PostgreSQL authority for snapshots, entities, adapter runs, deltas, and invalidations
incremental dependency invalidation, exact configuration-aware reuse, and semantic delta recomputation
governed artifact publication, replay-safe receipts, bounded telemetry, and rollback rehearsal
iterative independent review, public CodeRabbit review, vulnerability scanning, and two-phase closure evidence
out_of_scope: embeddings, semantic ranking, and Qdrant retrieval
author: codex
independent_validator: isolated whole-range audits, CodeRabbit public review, protected GitHub Actions on PostgreSQL 18.3, and a separate immutable candidate review
